# Release notes template
# This file is the default body pre-filled when a maintainer creates a release
# via the GitHub web UI. It mirrors the auto-generated format from
# `.github/release.yml` so manual + automated releases look consistent.

## 🛠️ delegate-team <version>

> *One-line summary of what's in this release.*

---

### TL;DR

```bash
# Install / upgrade
npm install -g delegate-team

# Or run without install
npx delegate-team@<version> --version
```

### 🎯 Why this release?

<!-- 2-3 sentences on the user-visible reason for this release. -->
<!-- What problem does it solve? What's the headline feature/fix? -->

### 🛠️ How to upgrade

```bash
# Existing users
npm install -g delegate-team@latest

# Verify
delegate-team --version   # should print <version>
dt run "Build X"          # smoke test
```

- 📦 [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/delegate-team)
